site.newsletterDesc: For the latest programs, events, workshops and news.

home.heroLead: UtopiaX unleashes boundaries around possibility through design thinking, ideation, retreats, and keynotes — putting humans first as we enter the age of the entrepreneur.
home.pillarsTitle: Three ways we work with you
home.pillarsDesc: Speaking, ideation workshops, and transformational retreats — each designed for individuation and real impact.
home.pillarOpenMindX: Keynotes and facilitation that challenge you to dream out loud and change your future.
home.pillarIdeationWorX: Moon shot ideating, design thinking, and strategies to bring ideas to life.
home.pillarLumiereX: Retreats for Body, Mind, Heart and Soul — purpose, presence, and transformation.
home.centresDesc: When Home, Work, Passion and Purpose align, the impossible becomes possible.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to add your factor X?
home.ctaDesc: Book a complimentary conversation or join Xperience Seekers for programs, events, and news.

openmindx.title: Speaking
openmindx.lead: To change the world you have to have vision. Dream out loud, think big, and let ideas flow. Christina delivers keynotes that challenge you to change your future and impact the world.
openmindx.body1: Anything is possible. Christina's keynotes are purposeful, honest and real — interactive and entertaining. She has presented at Vivid Ideas, SingularityU Australia Summit, Creative Innovation, PCOC, and other national and international events.
openmindx.body2: Christina designs customised presentations by request. Book a complimentary appointment to discuss your specific needs.
openmindx.quote: Christina is an Entrepreneurial Futurist and Business Accelerator. She is a gifted mentor who can future proof your business. — Louise Karch, Namefluence

keynotes.title: SingularityU Australia Summit
keynotes.desc: Top speakers on exponentially accelerating technologies.

keynotes.title: Creativity, Innovation & Business 101
keynotes.desc: Encourage teams to think creatively, Find the Gaps, and innovate.

keynotes.title: Don't Ask Don't Get — The Science Of Askology
keynotes.desc: Embed Askology into your daily behaviours for success.

ideationworx.title: Ideation & Design Thinking
ideationworx.lead: Ideas are the source of all change. We facilitate moon shot ideating sessions and develop strategies to bring ideas to life.
ideationworx.designBody: Design thinking draws on diverse knowledge and technology to create solutions from the end user's perspective. During the process, imagination is liberated around the pivotal question: What do humans need?
ideationworx.moonshotBody: Science fiction and futurism emerge from ideas. What was once imagination becomes reality. We encourage teams to think big and make things happen.
programs: Design Thinking Workshops (mobile — we come to you)
Your Relevant Future — 7 workshops over 6 months

lumierex.title: Retreats
lumierex.lead: Retreats and Xperiences that inspire growth of Body, Mind, Heart and Soul. Each Xperience is unique, focused on the individuation of every participant.
lumierex.body1: Retreats are inclusive of research on the head brain, heart brain and gut brain; intuition; and the science behind "we are what we think." Our focus: purpose and presence, intent and impact, reflection and revolution.
lumierex.body2: We are the sum of our four centres — when aligned, the impossible becomes possible. Our goals: Transformation, Mind Shifts, and Connection with each other and our environment.

retreats.title: Unleash Possibility
retreats.desc: For those with fire in their belly. Village Empowerment Programs for legacy through serving others.

retreats.title: Unlocking Creativity & Innovation
retreats.desc: Amplify potential, leadership, collaboration — reset with yoga.

about.title: About UtopiaX
about.lead: We are entering the fourth industrial revolution. At UtopiaX, we unleash boundaries around possibility to make the impossible possible.
about.utopicP1: UtopiaX seeks to connect individuals, organisations and movements to create a world that lives with kindness and compassion. We offer Xperiential programs, workshops and retreats, celebrating individuation and embodying community.
about.utopicP2: Our goal is to create Utopia — harmony, compassion, contribution, and belonging. Each of us adds our own factor X.

howCards.title: Design Thinking
howCards.desc: Human-centred innovation from the question: What do humans need?

howCards.title: Ideation
howCards.desc: Moon shot ideating and strategies to bring ideas to life.

howCards.title: Creativity
howCards.desc: Storytelling and improvisation for collaborative innovation.

values: We keep it real and raw and are accountable to ourselves and our community
We take calculated risks to realise our vision
We are challengers of the status quo
We constantly push the boundaries of possibility
about.founderBio1: Christina is a creativity and innovation catalyst. Founder of UtopiaX, she speaks at SingularityU Australia Summit, Vivid Ideas, and Creative Innovation; produces the Hunter Innovation Festival; and lectures in Business, Innovation and Entrepreneurship.
about.founderBio2: Graduate of Singularity University's Executive Program. Her purpose: ignite hearts and minds to what is possible.
